documents.t: Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years of development. This article takes you through Heiman's key milestones.
Heiman Technology's next-generation Matter smart smoke alarm HS1SA-M has been officially launched, making it one of the first smoke alarm products in the industry to receive Matter 1.2 certification.

documents.t: Welcome to Heiman Technology! This is the official knowledge base of Heiman Technology, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.
I'd like to say thank you to all of you for your contributions and interest in Heiman products. Also, thank you for sharing your setups, use cases, and fun integrations.
Contact Us
Homey is a smart home hub developed by the Dutch company Athom, supporting Zigbee, Z-Wave, Wi-Fi, Matter, Thread and other protocols.
ZHA is the built-in Zigbee integration for Home Assistant, allowing direct management of Zigbee devices without additional software.
Zigbee2MQTT is an open-source Zigbee gateway software that bridges Zigbee devices to the MQTT protocol, enabling integration with platforms such as Home Assistant.
In February 2026, Heiman Technology officially joined the Works with Home Assistant certification program, becoming one of the first Chinese partners in the program.
To give our users a better experience and reduce their learning curve, I wanted to build this wiki. It will introduce Heiman's products, supported platforms, and more.

documents.s: Heiman Technology Recognized as National "Little Giant" Enterprise

documents.t: In 2022, Heiman Technology was officially recognized as a national "Little Giant" enterprise (Specialized and New) for its deep technical expertise and innovation capabilities in the smart sensing field. This national-level recognition is a high affirmation of Heiman's specialization, refinement, differentiation, and innovation. Heiman will continue to deepen its focus on smart fire safety, smart gas safety, smart elderly care, and smart sensing, consistently delivering quality products and services to customers. Previously, Heiman Technology had already received several authoritative qualifications including National High-Tech Enterprise and Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME certifications.
documents.s: Heiman Technology Recognized as National "Little Giant" Enterprise

documents.t: Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years of development. This article takes you through Heiman's key milestones.
Shenzhen Heiman Technology Co., Ltd. was officially established, entering the security and sensing field.
Multiple products received EU CE certification, and a partnership was established with China Mobile.
Multiple products passed EU EN54-7 and EN14604 certification, marking product quality reaching international advanced standards.
The smart home project was fully launched, transitioning Heiman into a company focused on R&D, production, and sales of smart home products.
Developed China's first NB-IoT smoke alarm Won 2 German Red Dot Design Awards Obtained MFi certification and Apple manufacturer qualification
Completed Series A funding round with Shenzhen HTI Group as investor, received "Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME" designation.
Recognized as a national "Little Giant" enterprise; K1 series won German Red Dot Design Award.
Heiman testing laboratory officially passed national CNAS accreditation; smoke alarms and CO alarms were among the first to receive Matter 1.2 certification.
Continuous innovation, deeply engaged in smart fire safety, smart gas safety, smart elderly care, and smart sensing, providing quality products and services to customers in 100+ countries worldwide.

Heiman Technology's next-generation Matter smart smoke alarm HS1SA-M has been officially launched, making it one of the first smoke alarm products in the industry to receive Matter 1.2 certification. tipp HS1SA-M supports four major smart home ecosystems: Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings.
documents.s: Heiman Matter Smart Smoke Alarm Officially Launched

documents.t: Matter 1.2 Certified — Cross-brand, cross-ecosystem interoperability Photoelectric Smoke Sensing — Rapid response to various fire smoke types Voice Alarm Alerts — Multiple language options for clear hazard communication Self-Test Function — Periodic self-checks to ensure normal operation Remote Notification — Real-time push alerts via mobile app

HS1SA-M seamlessly integrates with mainstream smart home platforms, allowing users to control and manage it directly via their smartphones without the need for an additional gateway. For more details, visit Product Line.
Welcome to Heiman Technology! This is the official knowledge base of Heiman Technology, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.

Heiman Technology is dedicated to providing partners, developers, and customers with one-stop technical resources to help you quickly learn about: Product Center — Full range of smart fire, smart gas, smart elderly care, and smart sensing products Solutions — Industry-level smart security solutions Technical Documentation — API integration guides, SDK usage instructions, installation and deployment manuals Industry Insights — Cutting-edge trends and policy analysis in smart security

View Product Line to learn about Heiman's product range Read Company Overview to learn about Heiman's development history Visit Heiman Official Website for more information If you have any questions, please call customer service hotline 400-8959-500 or contact online customer service.

I'd like to say thank you to all of you for your contributions and interest in Heiman products. Also, thank you for sharing your setups, use cases, and fun integrations. Without your contributions, we wouldn't be able to polish our products and make them better.
Note: The following acknowledgments are listed in no particular order.​ Leo Buynow
Website: https://www.heiman.com.cn Global Site: https://www.heimantech.com Hotline: 400-8959-500 Enterprise Sales: 18123928516 (WeChat same number) Email: inquiry@heiman.com.cn
LinkedIn：@heimantech TikTok：@heimansmarthome Twitter / X：@heimantech YouTube：@heimantech

Heiman products are available through the following channels: Amazon: Available on major global sites Regional Distributors: Authorized distributors in Europe, Americas, and Asia Website Inquiry: Contact us through the official website for product quotes
Homey is a smart home hub developed by the Dutch company Athom, supporting Zigbee, Z-Wave, Wi-Fi, Matter, Thread and other protocols.

Heiman Zigbee and Z-Wave devices can be paired directly via Homey's built-in wireless chip, no additional gateway required. Matter devices can be connected through Homey Pro's built-in Thread border router.

Multi-protocol all-in-one: Homey Pro supports Zigbee, Z-Wave, Thread, and Wi-Fi simultaneously Local operation: All automations run locally Flow Automation: Drag-and-drop programming to create complex automation scenarios Reference: Search for Heiman-related apps in the Homey App Store
ZHA is the built-in Zigbee integration for Home Assistant, allowing direct management of Zigbee devices without additional software.

Heiman Zigbee sensors have excellent compatibility with ZHA, supporting: Smoke/CO Alarm: Alarm status, fault detection, battery level, silence Door/Window Sensor: Open/close, tamper PIR Sensor: Motion detection, illuminance Temperature & Humidity: Temperature, humidity Water Leak: Water leak alarm Smart Plug: On/off, power metering
Zigbee Coordinator: HUSBZB-1, Conbee II, SkyConnect, SLZB-06, etc. Connected to Home Assistant via USB or network

ZHA configuration is simple — select the serial port and region, and it will automatically scan and discover devices. No manual configuration file editing required. Reference: Home Assistant ZHA Documentation
Zigbee2MQTT is an open-source Zigbee gateway software that bridges Zigbee devices to the MQTT protocol, enabling integration with platforms such as Home Assistant.

Heiman Zigbee sensors have excellent compatibility with Zigbee2MQTT — most devices are automatically recognized and support all key functions: Smoke/Carbon Monoxide Alarm: Alarm status, fault detection, silence control, battery level Sensors: Temperature, humidity, illuminance, occupancy detection Door/Window Sensor: Open/close status, tamper detection
CC2652P / CC1352P series coordinators (e.g. SLZB-06, TubeZB, ZigStar) Heiman HS6GW series Zigbee gateways can also be used
# Zigbee2MQTT configuration example serial: port: /dev/ttyACM0 advanced: channel: 15 network_key: GENERATE Reference: Zigbee2MQTT Supported Devices
In February 2026, Heiman Technology officially joined the Works with Home Assistant certification program, becoming one of the first Chinese partners in the program.

The following Heiman devices have been officially certified to ensure localized and stable compatibility with Home Assistant: Device Region Connection Smart Smoke Alarm United States Matter over Thread Smart Smoke Alarm EU / China Matter over Thread Smart Carbon Monoxide Alarm United States Matter over Thread Smart Carbon Monoxide Alarm EU / China Matter over Thread PIR Sensor M1 Series Global Matter / Zigbee Water Leak Detector L1 Series Global Matter / Zigbee Temperature & Humidity Sensor H1 Series Global Matter / Zigbee

Ensure you have a Matter over Thread border router (e.g. Home Assistant Green + Connect ZBT-2, Apple HomePod, Google Nest Hub, etc.) Configure the Matter integration in Home Assistant Add the device and it will be automatically discovered
Heiman Zigbee devices are natively supported by Zigbee2MQTT and ZHA, no additional configuration required.
All certified devices support local control with no dependency on cloud services. Even if the internet is down, sensor alarms and automation actions continue to function normally.

Heiman actively participates in discussions within the Home Assistant community and continuously improves product experience based on user feedback. Reference: Home Assistant Official Announcement - Heiman joins Works with Home Assistant

To give our users a better experience and reduce their learning curve, I wanted to build this wiki. It will introduce Heiman's products, supported platforms, and more. All in all, we don't just want to build the great products you are looking for—we want to provide clear, easy-to-read documentation as well. Hopefully, when you think of smoke alarms, Heiman comes to mind. And when you think of Heiman, you'll think of Leo!
documents.s: Why do I maintain this Heiman Wiki?

documents.t: This is Leo, a Senior Engineer with 13 years of experience in embedded systems and wireless development. I specialize in Zigbee, Matter, BLE, Sub-1G, and Linux development, with a deep background in C/C++ and SCH/PCB design. Besides my engineering work, I’m a DIYer and tinkerer at heart. I love building smart devices and creating new things. I have been working at Heiman for 8 years, so I know most of our products inside and out—especially when it comes to Zigbee and Matter. I will be updating this wiki in my spare time; progress might be slow, but it will be continuous! Since I have an engineering background, if you have a great idea or suggestion, please feel free to drop me a line.

Shenzhen Heiman Technology Co., Ltd. (Heiman) was founded in 2005 and is a high-tech enterprise focused on the smart home security field. Headquartered in Shenzhen, China, with over 20 years of industry experience, its products are exported to Europe, Americas, Asia, and other regions worldwide.

Heiman Technology's mission is "Safeguard with craftsmanship, warm life with technology." Its main business areas include: Smart Fire Safety: Smoke alarms, carbon monoxide alarms, gas detectors, heat detectors, etc. Smart Gas Safety: Gas leak detection and remote shut-off solutions Smart Elderly Care: Fall detection, emergency call, and elderly safety monitoring solutions Smart Sensing: PIR sensors, presence sensors, door/window sensors, temperature/humidity sensors, water leak sensors, air quality sensors, etc.

Heiman is an early adopter and promoter of the Matter protocol, launching the world's first Matter-certified carbon monoxide alarm and smoke alarm. Products support multiple wireless protocols: Matter over Thread — Latest smart home interconnect standard Zigbee 3.0 — Mature low-power Mesh network Z-Wave — Mainstream smart home protocol in Europe and America Wi-Fi — Direct connection, no gateway required Sub-1G — Ultra-long range low-power communication

Heiman products are fully integrated with mainstream smart home platforms including Home Assistant, Apple HomeKit, Google Home, Amazon Alexa, SmartThings, Homey, OpenHAB, Zigbee2MQTT, ZHA, Tuya, etc., and have obtained official Works with Home Assistant, Works with Apple Home, Works with Google Home, Works with Smartthings, Works with Homey certification.
Heiman Smoke Sensor uses photoelectric smoke detection technology to sensitively detect visible smoke particles at the early stage of a fire, enabling ultra-early fire warning.

Series Communication Certification Target Market HS1SA Series Zigbee / Z-Wave EN 14604 EU HS3SA Series Zigbee EN 14604 EU HS8SA Zigbee / Wi-Fi UL 217 US S1 Series Sub-1G Standalone EN 14604 Universal HS1SA-M Matter over Thread EN 14604 Global

Photoelectric smoke detection, detects smoke from smoldering and open flames 85 dB high-volume audible and visual alarm Low battery reminder Self-test (one-button test) Tamper alarm Supports remote silence
Sensor type: Infrared photoelectric Alarm sound pressure: ≥85 dB (at 3m) Power supply: CR123A battery Battery life: ~3 years Operating temperature: -10°C ~ +50°C Operating humidity: ≤95% RH

Mount on ceiling, at the center of the room At least 30 cm away from walls or light fixtures Avoid dead air spaces (e.g. corners, behind beams) Do not install near: bathrooms (steam), kitchens (grease), ventilation openings

Select mounting location, ensure ceiling is flat Rotate and fix the mounting base to the ceiling (using screws or 3M adhesive) Insert battery (note polarity), sensor powers on automatically Rotate and snap the sensor body into the base Press and hold the test button — alarm LED flashes and alarm sounds to confirm normal operation Pair via gateway: enter pairing mode, add device in the APP
Test functionality once a month Battery life ~3 years, replace promptly when low Replace entire sensor every 10 years Mounting height does not affect smoke detection — smoke rises to the ceiling

Model Protocol Certification Power Market Usage Suggestions HS1SA-E Zigbee EN 14604 CR123A EU Integrate with Zigbee2MQTT/ZHA, Home Assistant automation — auto-turn on lights + push notification when smoke detected HS1SA-Z Z-Wave EN 14604 CR123A EU Connect to SmartThings/Hubitat, arm with Z-Wave door sensor, smoke alarm auto-notify when away HS1SA-M Matter over Thread EN 14604 CR123A Global Native Apple Home/Google Home integration, no dedicated gateway needed, low-latency Thread local alarm linkage HS3SA Zigbee EN 14604 CR123A EU Use with Heiman HS6GW gateway, multi-device scene linkage, ideal for Heiman ecosystem users HS8SA Zigbee / Wi-Fi UL 217 Battery/Mains US US market-dedicated, UL certified, meets local fire codes, supports WiFi direct or Zigbee gateway [S1 Series](../../无线协议/Sub1G(long distance range)/S1-Series-Standalone-Smoke-Alarm-Sub-1G) Sub-1G EN 14604 Battery Universal Standalone-interconnected, no gateway or internet needed, Sub-1G wireless interconnection between units, ideal for simple rentals

Scenario Recommended Model Automation Scheme Deep smart home integration HS1SA-E / HS1SA-M HA automation: smoke alarm → turn on all lights → unlock door → close gas valve → push notification Apple HomeKit users HS1SA-M Native Matter integration, HomePod as Thread border router, automatic scene triggers EU/US standard requirements HS1SA-E (CE) / HS8SA (UL) Meets local fire certifications, insurance compliance No gateway / low cost S1 Series Buy and use, Sub-1G interconnection between units, mutual triggering on alarm Existing Z-Wave system HS1SA-Z Use with existing Z-Wave gateway like Hubitat/SmartThings

EU market: HS1SA-E (Zigbee) or HS3SA (Zigbee), choose HS1SA-Z for Z-Wave US market: HS8SA (UL 217 certified) Cross-platform Matter: HS1SA-M (Matter over Thread) Standalone scenario: [S1 Series](../../无线协议/Sub1G(long distance range)/S1-Series-Standalone-Smoke-Alarm-Sub-1G) (no gateway needed)

Matter (formerly Project CHIP) is a smart home interoperability standard launched by the Connectivity Standards Alliance (CSA), designed to break down brand barriers and enable cross-ecosystem interoperability.
Heiman is an early adopter of the Matter protocol, launching the world's first Matter-certified carbon monoxide alarm. Heiman's Matter devices all use the Matter over Thread solution.

Feature Description Underlying Protocol Thread (Low-power Mesh Network) Network Topology Mesh self-healing network, wider coverage with more devices Power Consumption Ultra-low, battery-powered operation for 1-3 years Security Supports AES-128-CCM encryption, device certification required Interoperability Across Apple HomeKit, Google Home, Amazon Alexa, Home Assistant, etc.

Using Matter over Thread devices requires a Thread Border Router: Apple HomePod mini / HomePod 2nd Gen / Apple TV 4K Google Nest Hub 2nd Gen / Nest Hub Max Amazon Echo 4th Gen Home Assistant Green + Connect ZBT-2 Homey Pro
Smart Smoke Alarm (US/EU Version) Smart Carbon Monoxide Alarm (US/EU Version) PIR Sensor M1-M Water Leak Detector L1-M Temperature and Humidity Sensor H1-M
HS1SA-M is a Matter over Thread smart smoke alarm launched by Heiman, using photoelectric smoke detection technology and supporting cross-ecosystem smart home platform interoperability.
Product Type: Smart Smoke Alarm Communication Protocol: Matter over Thread Certification Standard: EN 14604 Typical Scenarios: Fire early warning in homes, apartments, hotels, etc.

Parameter Value Sensor Type Infrared Photoelectric Communication Protocol Matter over Thread (IEEE 802.15.4) Operating Frequency 2.4 GHz Alarm Sound Pressure ≥85 dB (3 m) Power Supply DC 3V (CR123A Lithium Battery) Battery Life Approx. 3 years Operating Temperature -10°C ~ +50°C Operating Humidity ≤95% RH (non-condensing)

Photoelectric smoke detection, capable of detecting smoldering and open flame smoke 85 dB loud audible and visual alarm Low battery reminder Self-test function (one-button test) Tamper alarm Remote silence Matter multi-ecosystem cross-platform interoperability
EN 14604 Certified Matter Certified

Platform Support Status Apple Home ✅ Requires Thread Border Router Google Home ✅ Requires Thread Border Router Amazon Alexa ✅ Requires Thread Border Router Home Assistant ✅ Matter Certified SmartThings ✅ Requires Thread Border Router
Requires a Thread Border Router, such as Apple HomePod mini, Google Nest Hub 2nd Gen, Amazon Echo 4th Gen, etc.

Matter devices require a Thread Border Router to use, such as Apple HomePod mini, Google Nest Hub 2nd Gen, etc. The current Heiman Matter product line is still expanding, with more models to be released gradually.
The following are the general technical parameters for Heiman Matter devices.

Parameter Value Underlying Protocol Thread (IEEE 802.15.4) Operating Frequency 2.4 GHz (ISM Band) Application Layer Standard Matter 1.x Network Topology Mesh Self-healing Network Encryption AES-128-CCM

Item Description Border Router Required, e.g. Apple HomePod mini, Apple TV 4K, Google Nest Hub 2nd Gen, etc. Mobile Support iOS / Android (via ecosystem App for pairing) Cross-ecosystem Interop Apple HomeKit, Google Home, Amazon Alexa, Home Assistant, SmartThings

Zigbee is a wireless communication technology designed specifically for smart home and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. Think of it like Wi-Fi or Bluetooth, but instead of sending high-speed data to your phone or computer, it sends small, low-power signals between smart devices like light bulbs, sensors, and switches. It is built on a mesh network architecture, which means devices don't just talk to a central router—they talk to each other. Every plugged-in device (like a smart plug or light bulb) acts as a repeater, passing the signal along to the next device. This extends the range and makes the network incredibly stable.

If you are building a smart home or developing IoT devices, Zigbee offers several massive advantages over Wi-Fi or Bluetooth: Low Power Consumption: Zigbee devices use very little energy. Battery-powered devices like motion detectors, door sensors, and temperature sensors can run for years on a single coin-cell battery. Excellent Reliability (Mesh Network): If one smart bulb in your kitchen goes offline, the signal automatically reroutes through another device (like a living room plug) to reach its destination. The more devices you add, the stronger and more resilient your network becomes. Doesn't Slow Down Your Wi-Fi: If you connect 50 smart switches and sensors directly to your home Wi-Fi router, your internet connection will likely slow down or drop. Zigbee operates on its own dedicated network via a central hub or gateway, keeping your main Wi-Fi completely clear. Local Control: Many Zigbee setups process commands locally through a hub rather than relying on the cloud. This means even if your internet goes down, your smart automation schedules and switches will still work perfectly. Highly Secure: Zigbee uses AES-128 encryption, ensuring that the data passing between your smart devices remains safe and secure from outside interference.

Heiman is among the first Chinese manufacturers to adopt the Zigbee protocol, with an extensive Zigbee product line. Heiman Zigbee devices are compatible with the Zigbee 3.0 standard and can interoperate with mainstream Zigbee gateways and coordinators.

Feature Description Frequency Band 2.4 GHz (Global) Data Rate Up to 250 kbps Network Topology Mesh Self-Healing Network Node Capacity Up to 65,535 nodes per network Communication Range Approx. 10-30 m indoors (depending on obstacles) Power Consumption Ultra-low; sensor battery life up to 3 years

Heiman Zigbee devices can be integrated with the following platforms: Zigbee2MQTT — Open-source Zigbee to MQTT bridge ZHA — Home Assistant built-in Zigbee integration Hubitat — Local smart home hub Homey — Multi-protocol smart home hub SmartThings Hub — Samsung smart home hub Tuya Zigbee Gateway — Tuya ecosystem Heiman HS6GW Gateway — Official gateway

HS1SA / HS3SA / HS8SA Series Smoke Alarms HS1CA / C1 Series Carbon Monoxide Alarms HS1CG / HS3CG Series Combustible Gas Detectors HS1DS Series Door/Window Sensors HS1MS / HS3MS / M1 Series PIR Motion Sensors HS2WL / HS3WL / HS1WL Series Water Leak Detectors HS2SK Series Smart Plugs HS2FD Fall Detector
The HS1SA-E is Heiman's standard Zigbee smart smoke alarm designed for the EU market. It uses photoelectric smoke detection technology, is EN 14604 certified, and has won the Red Dot Design Award.

Parameter Value Communication Protocol Zigbee 3.0 Sensor Type Infrared Photoelectric Alarm Sound Level ≥85 dB (3 m) Power Supply DC 3V (CR123A) Battery Life Approx. 3 years Communication Range ≤70 m (open area) Operating Temperature -10°C ~ +50°C Operating Humidity ≤95% RH Installation Method Ceiling Mount

Photoelectric smoke detection, capable of detecting smoke from smoldering and open flames 85 dB audible and visual alarm Low battery reminder Self-test function (one-button test) Tamper alarm Remote silence support OTA firmware upgrade
EN 14604 (European Standard for Smoke Alarms) Red Dot Design Award CE / RED
CR123A battery Mounting screws / wall plugs

Parameter Value Power Supply Battery (CR123A / CR2450 / AA) or USB / Mains (plug type) Battery Life Sensor type approx. 2~3 years (depending on reporting frequency) Standby Current Microamp level, supports sleep polling mechanism
Parameter Value Operating Temperature -10°C ~ +55°C Operating Humidity ≤95% RH (non-condensing) IP Rating Varies by model (sensor type typically IP30)

Thank you for choosing Heiman's products, we are more than happy to assist you with your questions, hope you have a great experices with Heiman barand. in case we didn't reply in time, please be gentle and ask us again, we may lost your message or some other reasons, but that is not intented to be.
